```erlang
-module(solution).
-export([solve/3]).

solve(M, N, WaitCost) ->
    Dist = create_dist(M, N),
    Dist1 = update_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 1, 1),
    Q = [[entry_cost(0, 0), 0, 0, 1]],
    loop(Dist1, Q, M, N, WaitCost).

create_dist(M, N) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(Row) ->
            lists:map(
                fun(Col) ->
                    [infinity, infinity]
                end,
                lists:seq(0, N-1)
            )
        end,
        lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

update_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity, NewCost) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    NewRow = lists:map(
        fun(Col, Index) ->
            if
                Index == J ->
                    [Cost0, Cost1] = Col,
                    if Parity == 0 -> [Cost0, NewCost]; true -> Col end;
                true -> Col
            end
        end,
        Row,
        J
    ),
    lists:map(
        fun(Row) -> Row end,
        Dist
    ).

loop(Dist, Q, M, N, WaitCost) ->
    case Q of
        [] -> -1;
        _ ->
            Min = lists:min(Q),
            [CurrentCost, I, J, Parity] = Min,
            if
                I == M-1, J == N-1 -> CurrentCost;
                true ->
                    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
                    Col = lists:nth(J+1, Row),
                    [Cost0, Cost1] = Col,
                    if
                        Parity == 1 ->
                            if CurrentCost < Cost1 ->
                                Directions = [[1, 0], [0, 1]],
                                NewQ = process_move(Dist, Directions, CurrentCost, I, J, 0, Q),
                                loop(Dist, NewQ, M, N, WaitCost);
                                true ->
                                    loop(Dist, Q, M, N, WaitCost)
                            end;
                        true ->
                            if CurrentCost < Cost0 ->
                                RowWait = lists:nth(I+1, WaitCost),
                                ColWait = lists:nth(J+1, RowWait),
                                NewCost = CurrentCost + ColWait,
                                NewDist = update_dist(Dist, I, J, 0, NewCost),
                                NewQ = [[NewCost, I, J, 1] | Q],
                                loop(NewDist, NewQ, M, N, WaitCost);
                                true ->
                                    loop(Dist, Q, M, N, WaitCost)
                            end
                    end
            end
    end.

entry_cost(I, J) ->
    (I + 1) * (J + 1).

process_move(Dist, Directions, CurrentCost, I, J, NextParity, Q) ->
    lists:foldl(
        fun({Di, Dj}, Acc) ->
            Ni = I + Di,
            Nj = J + Dj,
            if
                Ni >= 0, Ni < M, Nj >= 0, Nj < N ->
                    Row = lists:nth(Ni+1, Dist),
                    Col = lists:nth(Nj+1, Row),
                    [Cost0, Cost1] = Col,
                    NewCost = CurrentCost + entry_cost(Ni, Nj),
                    if NewCost < Cost0 ->
                        NewDist = update_dist(Dist, Ni, Nj, 0, NewCost),
                        [ [NewCost, Ni, Nj, 0] | Acc ];
                        true ->
                            Acc
                    end;
                true ->
                    Acc

    const initialCost = entryCost(0, 0);

    dist[0][0][1] = initialCost;

    // Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]

    // Directions for moving: down (i+1, j) and right (i, j+1)

            }

        }

    }

    // If no path found (should not happen as per problem statement)

    return -1;

}

```erlang
-module(solution).
-export([solve/3]).

solve(M, N, WaitCost) ->
    Dist = create_dist_matrix(M, N),
    InitialCost = entry_cost(0, 0),
    Dist0 = set_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 1, InitialCost),
    Queue = [{InitialCost, 0, 0, 1}],
    dijkstra(Dist0, Queue, M, N, WaitCost).

create_dist_matrix(M, N) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:map(
                fun(J) ->
                    [infinity, infinity]
                end,
                lists:seq(0, N-1)
            )
        end,
        lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

entry_cost(I, J) ->
    (I + 1) * (J + 1).

set_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity, Value) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Col = lists:nth(J+1, Row),
    NewCol = lists:sublist(Col, 1, Parity) ++ [Value] ++ lists:sublist(Col, Parity+2, length(Col) - Parity - 1),
    NewRow = lists:replace_element(J+1, NewCol, Row),
    lists:replace_element(I+1, NewRow, Dist).

get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Col = lists:nth(J+1, Row),
    lists:nth(Parity+1, Col).

dijkstra(Dist, Queue, M, N, WaitCost) ->
    case Queue of
        [] -> error;
        _ ->
            SortedQueue = lists:sort(Queue),
            {MinCost, I, J, Parity} = hd(SortedQueue),
            CurrentDist = get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity),
            if
                MinCost > CurrentDist ->
                    dijkstra(Dist, tl(SortedQueue), M, N, WaitCost);
                true ->
                    case {I, J} of
                        {M-1, N-1} -> MinCost;

```erlang
-module(solution).
-export([solve/3]).

solve(M, N, WaitCost) ->
    Dist = create_dist_matrix(M, N),
    InitialCost = entry_cost(0, 0),
    Dist0 = set_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 1, InitialCost),
    Queue = [{InitialCost, 0, 0, 1}],
    dijkstra(Dist0, Queue, M, N, WaitCost).

create_dist_matrix(M, N) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:map(
                fun(J) ->
                    [infinity, infinity]
                end,
                lists:seq(0, N-1)
            )
        end,
        lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

entry_cost(I, J) ->
    (I + 1) * (J + 1).

set_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity, Value) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Col = lists:nth(J+1, Row),
    NewCol = lists:sublist(Col, 1, Parity) ++ [Value] ++ lists:sublist(Col, Parity+2, length(Col) - Parity - 1),
    NewRow = lists:replace_element(J+1, NewCol, Row),
    lists:replace_element(I+1, NewRow, Dist).

get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Col = lists:nth(J+1, Row),
    lists:nth(Parity+1, Col).

dijkstra(Dist, Queue, M, N, WaitCost) ->
    case Queue of
        [] -> error;
        _ ->
            SortedQueue = lists:sort(Queue),
            {MinCost, I, J, Parity} = hd(SortedQueue),
            CurrentDist = get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity),
            if
                MinCost > CurrentDist ->
                    dijkstra(Dist, tl(SortedQueue), M, N, WaitCost);
                true ->
                    case {I, J} of
                        {M-1, N-1} -> MinCost;
                        _ ->
                            case Parity of
                                1 ->
                                    Directions = [[1, 0], [0, 1]],
                                    NewQueue = [],
                                    lists:foreach(
                                        fun([Di, Dj]) ->
                                            Ni = I + Di,
                                            Nj = J + Dj,
                                            if
                                                Ni >= 0, Ni < M, Nj >= 0, Nj < N ->
                                                    NewCost = MinCost + entry_cost(Ni, Nj),
                                                    Current = get_dist(Dist, Ni, Nj, 0),
                                                    if
                                                        NewCost < Current ->
                                                            NewDist = set_dist(Dist, Ni, Nj, 0, NewCost),
                                                            NewQueue = [{NewCost, Ni, Nj, 0} | NewQueue];
                                                        true -> ok
                                                    end;
                                                true -> ok
                                            end
                                        end,
                                        Directions
                                    ),
                                    dijkstra(NewDist, [ {MinCost, I, J, Parity} | NewQueue ], M, N, WaitCost);
                                0 ->
                                    CurrentWaitCost = lists:nth(I+1, WaitCost),
                                    CurrentWait = lists:nth(J+1, CurrentWaitCost),
                                    NewCost = MinCost + CurrentWait,
                                    Current = get_dist(Dist, I, J, 1),
                                    if
                                        NewCost < Current ->
                                            NewDist = set_dist(Dist, I, J, 1, NewCost),
                                            dijkstra(NewDist, [ {NewCost, I, J, 1} | NewQueue ], M, N, WaitCost);
                                        true -> dijkstra(Dist, tl(SortedQueue), M, N, WaitCost)
                                    end
                            end
                    end
            end
    end.
```

    // Initialize distance array

    const INF = Infinity;

    // Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]

    const pq = [[initialCost, 0, 0, 1]];

    // Directions for moving: down (i+1, j) and right (i, j+1)

    const directions = [[1, 0], [0, 1]];

    while (pq.length > 0) {

        // Pop the state with the smallest cost

        const [currentCost, i, j, parity] = pq.shift();

        // Check if this state is the end cell

        if (i === m - 1 && j === n - 1) {

            return currentCost;

        }

        // If this state's cost is higher than the recorded distance, skip

        if (currentCost > dist[i][j][parity]) {

            continue;

        }

        // Process transitions based on parity

        if (parity === 1) { // odd: must move

            // Try moving down and right

            for (const [di, dj] of directions) {

                const ni = i + di;

                const nj = j + dj;

                dist[i][j][1] = newCost;

                pq.push([newCost, i, j, 1]);

            }

        }

    }

    // If no path found (should not happen as per problem statement)

    return -1;

}

```erlang
-module(solve).
-export([solve/3]).

solve(M, N, WaitCost) ->
    EntryCost = fun(I, J) -> (I + 1) * (J + 1) end,
    Directions = [[1, 0], [0, 1]],
    Dist = create_dist_matrix(M, N, infinity),
    InitialCost = EntryCost(0, 0),
    Dist0 = set_dist(Dist, 0, 0, 1, InitialCost),
    Pq = [[InitialCost, 0, 0, 1]],
    process_queue(Pq, Dist0, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost).

create_dist_matrix(M, N, Inf) ->
    lists:map(
        fun(I) ->
            lists:map(
                fun(J) ->
                    [Inf, Inf]
                end,
                lists:seq(0, N-1)
            )
        end,
        lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

set_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity, Cost) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Row2 = lists:sublist(Row, J+1, 1),
    NewRow = [Cost | lists:nthtail(1, Row2)],
    NewRow2 = lists:replace(J+1, NewRow, Row),
    lists:replace(I+1, NewRow2, Dist).

process_queue(Pq, Dist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost) ->
    case Pq of
        [] -> -1;
        [Head | Tails] ->
            SortedPq = lists:sort(Pq),
            [CurrentCost, I, J, Parity] = lists:head(SortedPq),
            if
                I == M-1, J == N-1 ->
                    CurrentCost;
                true ->
                    Stored = get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity),
                    if
                        Stored < CurrentCost ->
                            if
                                Parity == 1 ->
                                    NewPositions = move(I, J, M, N),
                                    NewPositions = [ {Ni, Nj} || {Ni, Nj} <- NewPositions, Ni >= 0, Ni < M, Nj >= 0, Nj < N ],
                                    NewPq = [],
                                    lists:foreach(
                                        fun({Ni, Nj}) ->
                                            NewCost = CurrentCost + EntryCost(Ni, Nj),
                                            StoredNew = get_dist(Dist, Ni, Nj, 0),
                                            if
                                                StoredNew > NewCost ->
                                                    NewDist = set_dist(Dist, Ni, Nj, 0, NewCost),
                                                    NewPq = [NewCost, Ni, Nj, 0] ++ NewPq
                                            end
                                        end,
                                        NewPositions
                                    ),
                                    process_queue(NewPq, NewDist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost);
                                true ->
                                    WaitCostValue = lists:nth(I+1, WaitCost),
                                    WaitCostValue = lists:nth(J+1, WaitCostValue),
                                    NewCost = CurrentCost + WaitCostValue,
                                    NewDist = set_dist(Dist, I, J, 1, NewCost),
                                    NewPq = [NewCost, I, J, 1] ++ SortedPq,
                                    process_queue(NewPq, NewDist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost)
                            end;
                        true ->
                            process_queue(Tails, Dist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost)
                    end
            end
    end.

move(I, J, M, N) ->
    [ {I+1, J}, {I, J+1} ].

get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Cell = lists:nth(J+1, Row),
    lists:nth(Parity+1, Cell).
```

            )
        end,
        lists:seq(0, M-1)
    ).

    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Row2 = lists:sublist(Row, J+1, 1),
    NewRow = [Cost | lists:nthtail(1, Row2)],
    NewRow2 = lists:replace(J+1, NewRow, Row),
    lists:replace(I+1, NewRow2, Dist).

process_queue(Pq, Dist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost) ->
    case Pq of
        [] -> -1;
        [Head | Tails] ->
            SortedPq = lists:sort(Pq),
            [CurrentCost, I, J, Parity] = lists:head(SortedPq),
            if
                I == M-1, J == N-1 ->
                    CurrentCost;
                true ->
                    Stored = get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity),
                    if
                        Stored < CurrentCost ->
                            if
                                Parity == 1 ->
                                    NewPositions = move(I, J, M, N),
                                    NewPositions = [ {Ni, Nj} || {Ni, Nj} <- NewPositions, Ni >= 0, Ni < M, Nj >= 0, Nj < N ],
                                    NewPq = [],
                                    lists:foreach(
                                        fun({Ni, Nj}) ->
                                            NewCost = CurrentCost + EntryCost(Ni, Nj),
                                            StoredNew = get_dist(Dist, Ni, Nj, 0),
                                            if
                                                StoredNew > NewCost ->
                                                    NewDist = set_dist(Dist, Ni, Nj, 0, NewCost),
                                                    NewPq = [NewCost, Ni, Nj, 0] ++ NewPq
                                            end
                                        end,
                                        NewPositions
                                    ),
                                    process_queue(NewPq, NewDist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost);
                                true ->
                                    WaitCostValue = lists:nth(I+1, WaitCost),
                                    WaitCostValue = lists:nth(J+1, WaitCostValue),
                                    NewCost = CurrentCost + WaitCostValue,
                                    NewDist = set_dist(Dist, I, J, 1, NewCost),
                                    NewPq = [NewCost, I, J, 1] ++ SortedPq,
                                    process_queue(NewPq, NewDist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost)
                            end;
                        true ->
                            process_queue(Tails, Dist, Directions, EntryCost, M, N, WaitCost)
                    end
            end
    end.

move(I, J, M, N) ->
    [ {I+1, J}, {I, J+1} ].

get_dist(Dist, I, J, Parity) ->
    Row = lists:nth(I+1, Dist),
    Cell = lists:nth(J+1, Row),
    lists:nth(Parity+1, Cell).

                [this.heap[parent], this.heap[index]] = [this.heap[index], this.heap[parent]];

                index = parent;

            }

        }

        siftDown(index) {

            const length = this.heap.length;

            while (index < length) {

                const left = 2 * index + 1;

                const right = 2 * index + 2;

                let smallest = index;

                if (left < length && this.heap[left] < this.heap[smallest]) {

                    smallest = left;

                }

                if (right < length && this.heap[right] < this.heap[smallest]) {

                    smallest = right;

另外给你一个二维整数数组 `waitCost`，其中 `waitCost[i][j]` 定义了在该单元格 **等待** 的成本。

路径始终从第 1 步进入单元格 `(0, 0)` 并支付入场花费开始。

每一步，你都遵循交替模式：

- 在 **奇数秒** ，你必须向 **右** 或向 **下** 移动到 **相邻** 的单元格，并支付其进入成本。
- 在 **偶数秒** ，你必须原地 **等待****恰好** 1 秒并在 1 秒期间支付 `waitCost[i][j]`。

返回到达 `(m - 1, n - 1)` 所需的 **最小** 总成本。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**m = 1, n = 2, waitCost = [[1,2]]

**输出：**3

**解释：**

最佳路径为：

- 从第 1 秒开始在单元格 `(0, 0)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 1`。
- **第 1 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(0, 1)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 2`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 = 3`。

**示例 2：**

**输入：**m = 2, n = 2, waitCost = [[3,5],[2,4]]

**输出：**9

**解释：**

最佳路径为：

- 从第 1 秒开始在单元格 `(0, 0)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 1`。
- **第 1 秒**：向下移动到单元格 `(1, 0)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 2`。
- **第 2 秒**：在单元格 `(1, 0)` 等待，支付 `waitCost[1][0] = 2`。
- **第 3 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(1, 1)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 4`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 + 2 + 4 = 9`。

**示例 3：**

**输入：**m = 2, n = 3, waitCost = [[6,1,4],[3,2,5]]

**输出：**16

**解释：**

最佳路径为：

- 从第 1 秒开始在单元格 `(0, 0)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 1`。
- **第 1 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(0, 1)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 2`。
- **第 2 秒**：在单元格 `(0, 1)` 等待，支付 `waitCost[0][1] = 1`。
- **第 3 秒**：向下移动到单元格 `(1, 1)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 4`。
- **第 4 秒**：在单元格 `(1, 1)` 等待，支付 `waitCost[1][1] = 2`。
- **第 5 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(1, 2)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (2 + 1) = 6`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 + 1 + 4 + 2 + 6 = 16`。

function solve(m, n, waitCost) {

    // Initialize distance array

    const INF = Infinity;

    const dist = new Array(m).fill(null).map(() => new Array(n).fill(null).map(() => [INF, INF]));

    // Initial state: (0,0) with parity 1 (odd), cost is entry cost of (0,0)

    const entryCost = (i, j) => (i + 1) * (j + 1);

    const initialCost = entryCost(0, 0);

    dist[0][0][1] = initialCost;

    // Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]

    const pq = [[initialCost, 0, 0, 1]];

    // Directions for moving: down (i+1, j) and right (i, j+1)

    const directions = [[1, 0], [0, 1]];

    while (pq.length > 0) {

        // Pop the state with the smallest cost

        const [currentCost, i, j, parity] = pq.shift();

        // Check if this state is the end cell

        if (i === m - 1 && j === n - 1) {

            return currentCost;

        }

        // If this state's cost is higher than the recorded distance, skip

        if (currentCost > dist[i][j][parity]) {

            continue;

        }

        // Process transitions based on parity

        if (parity === 1) { // odd: must move

            // Try moving down and right

            for (const [di, dj] of directions) {

                const ni = i + di;

                const nj = j + dj;

                if (ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n) {

                    const newCost = currentCost + entryCost(ni, nj);

                    if (newCost < dist[ni][nj][0]) {

                        dist[ni][nj][0] = newCost;

                        pq.push([newCost, ni, nj, 0]);

                    }

                }

            }

        } else { // even: must wait

            // Wait in the same cell, parity becomes 1

            const newCost = currentCost + waitCost[i][j];

            if (newCost < dist[i][j][1]) {

                dist[i][j][1] = newCost;

                pq.push([newCost, i, j, 1]);

            }

        }

    }

    // If no path found (should not happen as per problem statement)

    return -1;

}

Please generate code to solve the following task:

给你两个整数 `m` 和 `n`，分别表示网格的行数和列数。

进入单元格 `(i, j)` 的成本定义为 `(i + 1) * (j + 1)`。

另外给你一个二维整数数组 `waitCost`，其中 `waitCost[i][j]` 定义了在该单元格 **等待** 的成本。

路径始终从第 1 步进入单元格 `(0, 0)` 并支付入场花费开始。

每一步，你都遵循交替模式：

- 在 **奇数秒** ，你必须向 **右** 或向 **下** 移动到 **相邻** 的单元格，并支付其进入成本。
- 在 **偶数秒** ，你必须原地 **等待****恰好** 1 秒并在 1 秒期间支付 `waitCost[i][j]`。

返回到达 `(m - 1, n - 1)` 所需的 **最小** 总成本。

 

**示例 1：**

**输入：**m = 1, n = 2, waitCost = [[1,2]]

**输出：**3

**解释：**

最佳路径为：

- 从第 1 秒开始在单元格 `(0, 0)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 1`。
- **第 1 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(0, 1)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 2`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 = 3`。

**示例 2：**

**输入：**m = 2, n = 2, waitCost = [[3,5],[2,4]]

**输出：**9

**解释：**

最佳路径为：

- 从第 1 秒开始在单元格 `(0, 0)`，进入成本为 `(0 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 1`。
- **第 1 秒**：向下移动到单元格 `(1, 0)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (0 + 1) = 2`。
- **第 2 秒**：在单元格 `(1, 0)` 等待，支付 `waitCost[1][0] = 2`。
- **第 3 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(1, 1)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 4`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 + 2 + 4 = 9`。

**示例 3：**

**输入：**m = 2, n = 3, waitCost = [[6,1,4],[3,2,5]]

**输出：**16

最佳路径为：

- **第 2 秒**：在单元格 `(0, 1)` 等待，支付 `waitCost[0][1] = 1`。
- **第 3 秒**：向下移动到单元格 `(1, 1)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (1 + 1) = 4`。
- **第 4 秒**：在单元格 `(1, 1)` 等待，支付 `waitCost[1][1] = 2`。
- **第 5 秒**：向右移动到单元格 `(1, 2)`，进入成本为 `(1 + 1) * (2 + 1) = 6`。

因此，总成本为 `1 + 2 + 1 + 4 + 2 + 6 = 16`。

function solve(m, n, waitCost) {

    // Initialize distance array

    const INF = Infinity;

    const dist = new Array(m).fill(null).map(() => new Array(n).fill(null).map(() => [INF, INF]));

    // Initial state: (0,0) with parity 1 (odd), cost is entry cost of (0,0)

    const entryCost = (i, j) => (i + 1) * (j + 1);

    const initialCost = entryCost(0, 0);

    dist[0][0][1] = initialCost;

    // Priority queue: [cost, i, j, parity]

    const pq = [[initialCost, 0, 0, 1]];

    // Directions for moving: down (i+1, j) and right (i, j+1)

    const directions = [[1, 0], [0, 1]];

    while (pq.length > 0) {

        // Pop the state with the smallest cost

        const [currentCost, i, j, parity] = pq.shift();

        // Check if this state is the end cell

        if (i === m - 1 && j === n - 1) {

            return currentCost;

        }

        // If this state's cost is higher than the recorded distance, skip

        if (currentCost > dist[i][j][parity]) {

            continue;

        }

        // Process transitions based on parity

        if (parity === 1) { // odd: must move

            // Try moving down and right

            for (const [di, dj] of directions) {

                const ni = i + di;

                const nj = j + dj;

                if (ni >= 0 && ni < m && nj >= 0 && nj < n) {

                    const newCost = currentCost + entryCost(ni, nj);

                    if (newCost < dist[ni][nj][0]) {

                        dist[ni][nj][0] = newCost;

                        pq.push([newCost, ni, nj, 0]);

                    }

                }

            }

        } else { // even: must wait

            // Wait in the same cell, parity becomes 1

            const newCost = currentCost + waitCost[i][j];

            if (newCost < dist[i][j][1]) {

                dist[i][j][1] = newCost;

                pq.push([newCost, i, j, 1]);

            }

        }

    }

    // If no path found (should not happen as per problem statement)

    return -1;

}
